info.name: Oracle Eloqua Bulk API
Contact Exports
Oracle Eloqua List contact export definitions

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Starting index for pagination

params.name: orderBy
params.description: Field to sort results by

items.docs: Retrieve all contact export definitions.

info.name: Oracle Eloqua Create a contact export definition

items.docs: Create a new export definition for contacts. After creation, create a sync to execute the export.

info.name: Oracle Eloqua Retrieve a contact export definition

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the resource

items.docs: Retrieve a specific contact export definition by its identifier.

info.name: Oracle Eloqua Update a contact export definition

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the resource

items.docs: Update an existing contact export definition.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the resource

items.docs: Delete a contact export definition by its identifier.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Starting index for pagination

items.docs: Retrieve the data from a completed contact export.

items.docs: Retrieve all contact import definitions.

items.docs: Create a new import definition for contacts. After creation, push data and create a sync to execute the import.

params.description: The unique identifier of the resource

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the resource

items.docs: Push data records to be processed by the contact import definition.

info.name: Oracle Eloqua Delete staged contact import data

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the resource

items.docs: Delete data that has been staged for the import but not yet synced.

info.name: Oracle Eloqua Create a contact sync action

items.docs: Create a sync action for contacts, such as setting subscription status.

info.name: Syncs
Oracle Eloqua List syncs

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return

params.description: Starting index for pagination

params.name: orderBy
params.description: Field to sort results by

items.docs: Retrieve all sync operations.

info.name: Oracle Eloqua Create a sync

items.docs: Create a new sync operation to execute an import or export definition. The sync triggers the actual data transfer.

params.description: The unique identifier of the resource

items.docs: Retrieve a specific sync operation by its identifier to check status.
